question_en: What is included in the rental?
answer_en: The rental includes all 7 en-suite bedrooms, the fully equipped indoor kitchen, the communal living area, courtyard, pool, tennis court, terrace, south garden, and private parking. The property is self-catering — no staff or chef are included in the base rate.
answer_es: El alquiler incluye las 7 habitaciones en suite, cocina interior totalmente equipada, sala común, patio, piscina, pista de tenis, terrazas y parking privado. La finca es de autoservicio — no se incluye personal ni chef en la tarifa base.
answer_ca: El lloguer inclou les 7 habitacions en suite, cuina interior totalment equipada, sala comú, pati, piscina, pista de tennis, terrasses i aparcament privat. La finca és d'autoservei — no s'inclou personal ni cuiner a la tarifa base.
